evidence: "...I tend to lose interest quickly...unless one has a really good twist to it or dives more into a thriller or mystery kind of a plot..."
"...the film deals in an old mystery and a family curse of sorts..."
"...the story was somewhat interesting but again, I think I've heard it before..."
"...the film has some breathtaking action scenes combined with a performance by Denzel Washington..."
"...the pacing is a bit slow and character-driven..."
"...the film is meant to be exciting and adventurous..."
"...the production and filming are overall, exceptional..."
"...the casting is bad, this cast is just great!"
"...John Travolta is always accomplished in the role he plays..."
"...Mick Garris took the bull by the horns and along with King..."
"...the scenes of an empty New York city are very sombering..."
"...the twisted sci-fi style of virtual lab work that allows you to actually SEE the past/future..."
"...a true story that has a lot of heart and emotion to it..."
"...the message...shows how dreams do come true even if they seem totally impossible..."

summary: The user enjoys thrillers and horror with a preference for high production quality and emotional storytelling. They appreciate complex narratives but also have mixed feelings about pacing, indicating a balance between action and character development.
